curation.synopsis: On a forge world torn apart by corruption, Alpha Primus Haldron-44 Stroika leads a legion of skitarii into battle. The discovery of an ancient colony ship, the Stella-Xenithica, by the Magos Explorator Omnid Torquora drags Stroika and his cybernetic soldiers into a desperate war against twisted machines, daemon engines, and the servants of the Dark Mechanicum. When a cataclysm severs him from his tech-priest overseers, Stroika must rely on his own augmented instincts to rally his forces and hold the line. Told from the front-line perspective of the Adeptus Mechanicus war machine, this is a portrait of duty and faith expressed through cold steel and ritual, where a soldier built for one purpose discovers the cost of carrying it out alone.

flags.reason: skitarii protagonist archetype has no exact protagonist_class value; tech_priest used as nearest Mechanicus class
